    Sign in
    Get the ultimate college bundle

    Windows 11

    It starts on Windows

    Work. Play. Connect. Windows brings your worlds together, all in one place.

    Controller-friendly

    Snap to it 

    Whether you're planning your day or a big trip, organize windows on your screen with Snap layouts and create Snap groups to hop back into.5

    Explore Snap layouts

    Productivity, accelerated

    Get work done faster with Copilot inside your favorite Microsoft apps like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.1

    Explore Microsoft 365

    Ready. Set. Game on.

    Windows offers top games, advanced graphics capabilities, plus a Game Bar for instant access to screen recording, chats, and more.

    Explore PC gaming

    The Windows difference

    Choose from flexible 2-in-1s, slim laptops, powerful gaming PCs and more, across a range of display size, memory, and storage options.

    Shop PCs

    Say hello to security

    No need to remember or type your password. Log in with your face, fingerprint, or PIN using Windows Hello3.

    Explore Windows security

    Find your perfect PC

    Laptops

    Powerful, portable, and optimized for Windows performance.

    Shop now

    Gaming PCs

    For high-performance gaming and more.

    Shop now

    2-in-1 PCs

    Part laptop, part tablet. Total versatility.

    Shop now

    Desktop PCs

    Strong performers for everyday needs.

    Shop now

    Performance PCs

    For all-day work performance6 with gaming power.

    Shop now

    Real Windows stories

    “Building your own opportunities starts with the right tools. For me, Windows has been that essential digital toolbox.”

    @MakaylaLysiak, Windows sponsored partner

    Surface Pro 13 in.

    MSRP $1,499.99

    Buy

    Windows vs. others

    Windows
    Other major operating systems
    Flexibility
    Flexibility

    Broad choice of PC types

    Flexibility

    Limited device compatibility

    Compatibility
    Compatibility

    Works with your apps and accessories3

    Compatibility

    May require platform specific apps and accessories

    Local AI
    Local AI

    AI tools on Windows

    Local AI

    AI features vary by device

    Gaming
    Gaming

    Largest PC game ecosystem2

    Gaming

    Fewer PC titles to choose from2

    Security
    Security

    Built-in protection from Microsoft

    Security

    Varies by platform

    Discover more of Windows

    The ultimate college bundle

    Get 1 year of Microsoft 365 Premium, 1 year XBOX Game Pass Ultimate, and more.14

    Read article

    Play your way on Windows 11

    Access a massive game library, choose how to play, and manage everything in one place with the XBOX PC app.

    Read article

    Get more done with Copilot in Microsoft 365

    Discover faster ways to work in Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and more.1

    Read article

    Questions about Windows 11? Start here.

    Screens simulated. Features and app availability may vary by region and market.

    1. [*]

      Unless Microsoft is listed as the retailer, clicking a third-party retailer link will take you to an external website, whose privacy policy, terms and conditions will apply. Microsoft is not responsible for the privacy policy, content, or accuracy of external websites. All specifications are subject to change without notice. Please check with each retailer for exact offers. Products may not be available in all markets. Displayed prices are current lowest prices offered by stated retailers and are subject to change. Prices are not offered by Microsoft unless stated.

    2. [1]

      Microsoft 365 Personal, Family, or Premium subscription required. AI features only available to subscription owner and cannot be shared; usage limits apply. Learn more. Minimum age limits may apply to use of AI features. Details.

    3. [2]

      Based on Steam’s catalog of PC games. Source: The Preferences Powering PC Gaming report by Ampere Analysis, commissioned by Microsoft, September 2025.

    4. [3]

      Hardware-dependent. Learn more.

    5. [5]

      Some layouts only available based on display resolution and scale settings.

    6. [6]

      Battery life varies significantly by device, and with settings, usage, and other factors.

    7. [9]

      App availability varies by market.

    8. [10]

      Works with specific text, image, and document formats only; optimized for select languages (English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish). See aka.ms/copilotpluspcs.

    9. [13]

      Games sold separately; availability varies by device, region and over time. Internet, additional fees, minimum hardware, and/or other requirements apply for some games and features. Performance may vary significantly by device.

    10. [14]

      Through 6/30/26, while supplies last. Available only to eligible college students with a valid .edu email address who are new subscribers; auto-renew and other terms apply. See terms for details.
